]

]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance MotorSpeedData : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringPositionData : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringPositionSensor
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data in virtual environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloud
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation
]

instance DepthCameraDataData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Depth camera data from stereo vision system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation
]

instance MotorSpeedDataData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation
]

instance SteeringPositionDataData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation
]

instance ObjectTracksROS2Message : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
]

instance ProcessedPointCloudROS2Message : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathROS2Message : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
]

instance VehicleStateDataROS2Message : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Object tracks data produced by Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksROS2Message
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ProcessedPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Processed point cloud data after clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedPointCloudROS2Message
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedDrivingPathROS2Message
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Aggregated vehicle state information (speed, steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataROS2Message
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Component using Kalman filter for object state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation, ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic for lead vehicle position and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase, ROS2Middleware
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 software development kit for low-latency communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for internal component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Data Collecting Functional Entity for sensor data collection and serialization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation component for message alignment and unit conversion"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity for motor voltage command conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserInterfaceFE
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel, ACCLogicModel, SQLDatabase, DataCollectionFE, ISO23247DataTranslation
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorSpeedSensor, SteeringPositionSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, Motor, ActuationFE
]

instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "User Interface Functional Entity for human interaction"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent for real-time vehicle state rendering"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent for manual operation commands"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time visualization, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, RealTimeProjectedDrivingPathVisualization, RealTimeObjectTracksVisualization, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading of ACC system to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationCommandsAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Remote Management for operator control commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance RealTimeProjectedDrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving path"
]

instance RealTimeObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "User-triggered report generation from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Following speed computation based on distance"
]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    base:desc "Operator command to enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Operator command to disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Operator command to set desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Operator command for emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle for ACC domain"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor and steering actuation are generated by the ACC Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE, serialized via the Data Translation component, and transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to the Actuation FE for physical actuation. Specific command formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, and conflict resolution are not detailed in the provided documents."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system enforces 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading and device coordination, a requirement dictated by hardware limitations despite industry standards for safety-critical vehicular applications mandating stricter synchronization (sub-100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with entity-based organization, implementing each Functional Entity (FE) as individual ROS2 packages. The system comprises three entities deployed on different hardware: User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and Physical Twin Entity (data pre-processing, actuation, device communication, and automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2, while inter-entity communication (physical to digital and vice versa) uses Wi-Fi with UDP in the transport layer. No details on network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, or security protocols are provided."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to ISO 23247-2021 standard, which consists of four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The Reference architecture (Part 2) defines entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. For information exchange (Part 4), OPC Unified Architecture is utilized as a protocol for data collection and device control interoperability."
]
